name: Pot Roast
recipeInstructions: I enjoy knowing my dinner is already cooking—even on days I don't work outside the home. I often make two recipes: one or the other simmers when out-of-town guests arrive (my family is known for being late). Crock pot meals are perfect for uncertain meal times. Arrange the vegetables at the bottom and place the meat on top. Season with salt and pepper. Pour water over everything. Simmer low all day. Occasionally, add an envelope of onion soup mix or a small can of whole tomatoes for variety. The meat falls apart and is delicious!
